description: M10 xlarge 2_5d_interposer benchmark case derived from ITC'02 p93791. Topology, IEEE 1838 control widths, power split, and thermal RC parameters are model assumptions.
provenance_notes: ITC'02 p93791.soc provides selected module I/O, scan-chain lengths, and pattern counts.
UCIe/Open3DBench public values motivate link/topology abstractions but do not define IEEE 1838 FPP internals.
IEEE 1838 bit widths, DWR lengths, per-phase power, and thermal proxy parameters are model assumptions.
